title: Vendor in containers/common v0.30.0
body:
As per title 

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

comments.body: The change LGTM, my only question is this for v2.2 or v3.0?

@TomSweeneyRedHat the only changes in common are for this issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7888, not sure if this is 2.2 or 3.0, but it shouldn't affect anything outside this one issue. I can hold this and vendor it in with the completed issue too if that's better
@ashley-cui Every new feature is 3.0 Only bug fixes for 2.2.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
